result:
Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Simulation Scripting & Choreography System

### New file: `life/modes/scripting.py`

**DSL Parser** supporting these commands:
- `mode <name>` — switch simulation (gol, wave, rd, fire, boids, ising, rps, physarum + aliases)
- `wait <duration>` — pause execution (e.g. `5s`, `500ms`)
- `effect <name> on|off|toggle` — toggle post-processing effects (scanlines, bloom, trails, edge_detect, color_cycle, crt)
- `topology <name>` — set grid topology (plane, torus, klein_bottle, mobius_strip, projective_plane)
- `set <param> <value>` — set parameters inline
- `sweep <param> <from> <to> over <duration>` — animate a parameter over time with smooth easing
- `transition crossfade|cut|fade <duration>` — transition style between modes
- `speed <label>` — set simulation speed (0.5x through 100x)
- `color <1-7>` — set display color
- `label <text>` — show a fading title card overlay
- `loop` — jump back to start for infinite playback
- Comments (`#`) and blank lines are supported

**5 built-in example scripts**: Emergence, Fluid Dreams, Life & Death, Speed Ramp, Full Tour

**Playback controls**: Space (pause/resume), n (skip wait), r (restart), s (toggle source view), Esc (exit)

**Load `.show` files** from disk via the menu

### Modified files:
- **`app.py`**: Added 28 state variables, draw dispatch, run loop dispatch (menu + playback + stepping), Ctrl+U keybinding, help text entry
- **`modes/__init__.py`**: Registered scripting module
- **`registry.py`**: Added mode browser entry under "Meta Modes"

**Keybinding**: `Ctrl+U` (since `Ctrl+Y` was already taken by 3D Terrain Flythrough)
